uplink._note: Upstream codec yaml uplinkDecoder example; SenseAir (plugin_id 52) val_1 = int32 LE /1e4 = 528 ppm -> air.co2. Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (ppm:528).
Synthetic 2-value SenseAir frame; upstream decodes ppm:612, temp:21.5. co2 -> air.co2; companion temp carried as extra sensorTemperature (no temperature-only vocabulary home).

uplink.description: MHZ19 CO2 ppm + temperature + sensor U
uplink._note: Synthetic MHZ19 (plugin_id 49) frame; upstream decodes ppm:800, temp:24.3, U:410. co2 -> air.co2; temp and U as extras.
Synthetic CCS811 (plugin_id 90) frame; upstream decodes TVOC:125, eCO2:650. eCO2 -> air.co2; TVOC as extra (vocabulary does not model TVOC).

uplink.description: non-CO2 sensor frame (DHT temp+humidity) — no air-quality value
uplink._note: Synthetic DHT (plugin_id 5) frame (temp 22.4, hum 55.0 upstream). This generic node reports no CO2 here, so there is no air-quality vocabulary value; rejected.
PACKED uplinks are sent on fPort 1; any other port is rejected.
Fewer than the 5 header bytes; rejected.
